code.name: MCNP
code.notes: Results contributed by Hrvoje Brkic (HB_ filename prefix). Output filenames use HB_ prefix and show inconsistent page numbering across files; see notes per output entry. F4 tally = track-length flux estimate; F6 tally = dose. LET values derived from stopping power via a separate spreadsheet (LET_Calculation.ods).

outputs.description: Depth LET profiles along the Z axis in silicon. 2 files: DLET (p3) and TLET (p6) for primary protons only. No secondary particle contributions available.
outputs.notes: File names contain double underscore before page number; format is 2-column (depth, LET) with no uncertainty column.

outputs.description: Depth dose profile along the Z axis (F6 tally, MeV/g/SP).
outputs.notes: Filename is HB_narrow_dose_p02 (missing _Z_); naming inconsistency relative to plan02. Format is 3-column (depth, value, uncertainty).

outputs.description: Flux of primary particles along the Z axis (F4 tally). Named as 'dose_p01' in the filename despite being a flux quantity.
outputs.notes: Misleadingly named HB_Z_narrow_dose_p01 despite being a flux (F4) tally. Format is 3-column (depth, value, uncertainty).

outputs.description: Dose in silicon target volume (F6 tally, MeV/g/SP). Single integrated value.
outputs.notes: HB_target_p02 corresponds to '*target_p02' in the results README. Single scalar value with uncertainty.

outputs.description: Flux in silicon target volume (F4 tally). Single integrated value. Naming deviates from page convention (01 without 'p' prefix).
outputs.notes: Named HB_target_01 (no 'p' prefix) unlike other files. Likely corresponds to F4 flux tally for the target volume.
